final:
module top_module (
	input clk,
	input load,
	input [2:0] data_in,
	output reg [2:0] shift_reg);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		if (load)
			shift_reg <= data_in;
		else
			shift_reg <= shift_reg << 1;
	end
	
endmodule
